title: Publish benchmarks
description: Publish reproducible benchmark results after the context surface is coherent. Use CoIR/CoSQA for correctness and a pinned large repo plus omengrep src for indexing/search latency. Report raw data, index size, throughput, p50/p99, and compare against relevant local tools only.

logs.msg: Deprioritized. Features/fixes take priority over benchmarks for now. Can add after v0.0.2 release. No blocker.
Separate note: cargo update changed only Cargo.lock, including ort rc.11 -> rc.12 and a broad transitive refresh. Validating with cargo test before considering cargo upgrade.
Defer publishing until context surfaces settle. Benchmarks should compare against relevant local tools with reproducible correctness + performance methodology.
